name: unofficial-clay-cli
description: Run Clay from your terminal or your AI agent - 50 commands, declarative playbooks, community workflow templates, and safety gates. Unofficial, not affiliated with Clay.

scripts.check: node --check clay-v2.js && node --check lib/plan-playbook.js && node --check lib/intake-request.js && node --check lib/prepare-sample-run.js && node --check lib/advance-sample-run.js && tests/test-merge-catalog-shards.js
scripts.smoke:validate: node clay-v2.js validate-spec specs/declarative-smoke.yaml && node clay-v2.js validate-spec specs/people-source-preview-smoke.yaml && node clay-v2.js validate-spec specs/company-source-preview-smoke.yaml && for f in specs/templates/*.yaml; do node clay-v2.js validate-spec "$f"; done
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm run smoke:validate && npm run test:redaction && npm run test:playbooks && npm run test:prompts && npm run test:intake && npm run test:prepare && npm run test:advance && npm run test:scale && npm run test:simulate && npm run test:audit && npm run test:profile && npm run test:parity && npm run test:plan && npm run test:preflight && npm run test:hydrate && npm run test:evidence && npm run test:report && npm run test:config && npm run test:ignore && npm run test:agents && npm run test:contract && npm run test:model-compat && npm run test:input-deps && npm run test:integrations && npm run test:proof-packet && npm run test:proof-harness && npm run test:public && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:package-rollup && npm run test:safety && npm run test:proof-strategy && npm run test:catalog-status && npm run test:actions && npm run test:catalog-promotion && npm run test:catalog-coverage && npm run test:blocked-actions && npm run test:package-playbooks && npm run test:catalog-delta && npm run test:merge-shards
